title: GTA 6 pre-order date and cover art revealed by Rockstar
description: The developer has said pre-sales of the hugely anticipated game will begin on 25 June.

title: AI will create more jobs for humans, not replace them, Amazon founder Bezos says
description: The Amazon founder, who now has robotics and space travel companies, thinks AI will create a labour shortage.

title: What to study in the AI age - from big tech bosses
description: Sundar Pichai, Jensen Huang and Jack Clark share their advice with the BBC.

title: Snap unveils £1,995 smart glasses after previous flops
description: The augmented reality glasses from Snapchat's parent company are expected to ship in autumn.

title: Five big questions about the UK's under-16s social media ban
description: A ban is coming - but it's still not clear what it will mean for sites including Roblox, YouTube and WhatsApp.

title: When will social media ban start, and which apps will be affected?
description: The measures will see apps including TikTok and Snapchat banned for UK teens early in 2027.

title: What is Helium-3 and could we get it from the moon?
description: Helium-3 is expensive and demand is forecast to soar, so some are planning to mine it on the moon.

title: Social media ban - bold and blunt, but no silver bullet
description: The BBC's technology editor Zoe Kleinman on the big changes coming down the line for young people online.
